title: INTERACTIVE REGISTERS OF DISINFECTION AND USE OF DISINFECTANTS, TRANSPORT VEHICLES ENTERING THE FARM, ENTRANCES TO POULTRY HOUSES, AND DAILY INSPECTIONS OF THE POULTRY FLOCK
description: A guide to interactive biosecurity registers for recording disinfection, transport vehicle movements, poultry house entries, rodent control, and daily flock inspections on poultry farms. It outlines the 2022 Polish legal requirements, available Word and Excel templates issued by the General Veterinary Inspectorate, and their use in audits and farm activity optimization.
